heading: Powers
label: 70106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7010636:5602., , .Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII, § 1802110 Stat. 2760The words “each State in which it is incorporated” are substituted for “the State of Delaware” for consistency in the revised title. The words “and subject to the laws of such State” are omitted as unnecessary.
